tombstone.detail: empty-body GUI comment-row artifact; dead even in WC3
no-op stub; engine housekeeping with no LitD equivalent (tooling.md §2.5)
bj_lastStartedTimer side channel; superseded — Game.After/Every return the Timer directly (dedup §3 ex.6), timers.md
Go return value from Game.CreateUnit replaces the bj_lastCreatedUnit side channel
boolean-flag pause/resume wrapper superseded by the explicit Timer.Pause()/Resume() verbs (dedup §3), timers.md
superseded by composing Rect.Contains(i.Position()) — no dedicated overload (R-API-2)
superseded by composing Rect.Contains(u.Position()) — no dedicated overload (R-API-2)
one-call position+facing combo; superseded by Unit.SetPosition(pos) + Unit.SetFacing(angle) — the two canonical setters express it without a bundling helper
position + face-toward-location combo; superseded by Unit.SetPosition(pos) + Unit.SetFacing(angle-to-target); the look-at angle is computed at the call site from the two points
rect-as-region enter wrapper superseded by NewRegion+AddRect then OnEvent(EventRegionEnter) (#241)
null-filter region-enter wrapper superseded by OnEvent(EventRegionEnter) (#241)
rect-as-region leave wrapper superseded by NewRegion+AddRect then OnEvent(EventRegionLeave) (#241)
null-filter region-leave wrapper superseded by OnEvent(EventRegionLeave) (#241)
timer-as-event-bus convenience superseded; timer callbacks are the canonical path (Game.Every), not the OnEvent route (timers.md)
timer-as-event-bus convenience superseded; timer callbacks are the canonical path (Game.After), not the OnEvent route (timers.md)
timer-expire event registration superseded; the periodic/one-shot callback is the canonical path, not the OnEvent route (timers.md)
render-only animation-tag toggle; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
boolexpr AND-combinator; Go closures compose with && (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
bitwise AND; Go has the native & operator. No public surface (math-strings-conversion.md)
bitwise OR; Go has the native | operator. No public surface (math-strings-conversion.md)
bitwise XOR; Go has the native ^ operator. No public surface (math-strings-conversion.md)
frame getter — ui-frames (#245)
frame event id — ui-frames (#245)
frame text — ui-frames (#245)
frame value — ui-frames (#245)
key-down query — ui-frames (#245)
key getter — ui-frames (#245)
meta-key getter — ui-frames (#245)
mouse-button input — ui-frames (#245)
mouse input — ui-frames (#245)
mouse input — ui-frames (#245)
mouse input — ui-frames (#245)
sync data — networking (#316)
sync prefix — networking (#316)
damage-type override needs a damage-type field in the OnDamage payload; deferred (#219)
frame events — ui-frames (#245)
key events — ui-frames (#245)
player sync events — networking (#316)
wraps a code func into a conditionfunc; a Go func(Event) bool IS the condition (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)

defeat conditions belong to the game-state-and-melee surface (#256)
MIDI is a dead format; LitD audio is .ogg via OpenAL (R-AUD-1, sound-and-music.md). No public surface
trigger creation superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)

goMapping.goSignature: (owner Player, typ UnitType, pos Vec2, facing Angle) Unit

tombstone.detail: manual boolexpr free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
manual conditionfunc free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
defeat-condition free — game-state-and-melee (#256)
manual filterfunc free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
explicit handle free — Go forces are GC-managed script-side registry entries; no manual destroy
trigger free (GC) superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)
trigger disable superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)
trigger enable superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)

call-by-string-name dispatch; superseded by Go closures — the one dynamic JASS feature deliberately not ported (math-strings-conversion.md §5, D-2026-06-11-8). Lua embedding restores call-by-name for runtime worlds (#267)
wraps a code func into a filterfunc; a Go func(Event) bool IS the filter — WithFilter(fn) (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
cinematic subtitle presentation toggle; no sim effect
enumerate-allies-into-force superseded by Game.Allies(p) []Player (slice model, R-EXEC-4)
enumerate-enemies-into-force superseded by Game.Enemies(p) []Player

detecting player needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
game-state event value needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
chat string — networking/chat (#316)
matched chat string — networking/chat (#316)
player-state event value needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
unit-state event value needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
thread-local current-timer accessor; superseded by the periodic callback receiving its Timer parameter (R-EXEC-4 eliminates implicit current-element state), timers.md
order id needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
learned ability id needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
learned skill level needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)
GetLoadedUnit returns a second participant the current Event payload does not carry; deferred until the payload grows a secondary-entity slot for those kinds (#219)

GetLocalPlayer is the classic per-client desync footgun (hazard 1); structurally eliminated — per-player presentation takes the player as a parameter on render/UI receivers, never a global fork inside sim logic
location X accessor superseded by the Vec2.X field (R-API-2)
location Y accessor superseded by the Vec2.Y field (R-API-2)
terrain Z sampling needs a real heightfield; flat-0 would be a fake SoT — deferred to the heightfield work tracked in #371 (location→Vec2 leaves no Z channel in v1)
handicap damage multiplier needs wiring into the combat damage pipeline; deferred to a follow-up so the accessor reflects real applied state, not a stored-but-ignored value (no fake SoT)
damage handicap needs combat-pipeline wiring; deferred
revive-time handicap needs hero-revive wiring; deferred
XP handicap needs hero-XP pipeline wiring; deferred
end-game score-screen metric; presentation, not sim state
lobby selectability flag; no sim effect
player slot lifecycle (empty/playing/left) needs the leave/disconnect model not built in v1; deferred
per-player structure tally — AIView count family (#274); deferred
upkeep tax-rate needs the gold/lumber upkeep economy not built in v1; deferred
tech-count query — tech-tree surface (#303); deferred
tech max-allowed query — tech-tree surface (#303); deferred
tech-researched query — tech-tree surface (#303); deferred
typed per-player unit tally — AIView count family (#274); deferred
per-player unit tally belongs to the AIView count family (#274); deferred to the groups/AI surface
active player-count query; deferred with SetPlayers
researched upgrade id needs an Event payload field not yet carried for that kind; deferred (#219)

eval counter superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)

exec counter superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)
trigger-widget getter superseded by OnEvent(kind, closure) + Subscription.Cancel (no trigger/condition/action handles in the Go model, R-API-4)
trackable getter — ui-frames (#245)
type's base fly height; static counterpart to the deferred dynamic fly-height — mapping it alone is a capability-free half-feature. Deferred with the family (#367)
type's base prop window; static counterpart to the deferred dynamic prop-window. Deferred with the family (#367)
unit z (fly height); needs a per-unit climb-integrated z column the 2D sim lacks. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
prop window (translation gate angle); a behavioral movement change with no backing state. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
destructables are not modeled in the engine yet; the destructable-rally getter is deferred until the destructable subsystem lands (capability preserved, not averaged away) (#217)
int->real cast; Go uses float64(i) natively (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
int->string; Go uses strconv.Itoa/fmt (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
observer presentation state; no sim effect in v1
lobby race-preference query; no sim effect
